Specifications

*'''Type:''' Assault Rifle *'''Length:''' 888 mm (34.9 in) *'''Barrel Length''': 421 mm (16.5 in) *'''Cartridge:''' 7.62×39mm *'''Action:''' Gas-operated, long stroke piston *'''Rate of Fire:''' Cyclic rate of fire: 600 rounds per minute; Semi-Automatic: 40 rounds/min; Fully automatic: 110 rounds/min *'''Effective firing range:'''300 meters (328 yards) *'''Sights:''' Rear sight notch; 100-1,000 meter sight adjustments |}
__TOC__ ==Overview== ANARKM-12 is an automatic assault rifle designed by Agorean arms company Guzzler-Boon in 2012 within [[Level 92]]. The ANARKM-12's design is a slightly modified version of the renowned AKM meant to be an alternative to Auriellen/M.E.G [[Object 29|Kalthoff Rifles]], used by many offshoots of Agoreas and anarchists. The ANARKM-12 was designed with the intention of being effective in most combat settings a freedom fighter would find his/herself in. It has also slight deviations from the AKM due to resource constraints within the Backrooms. What is unique to the ANARKM-12, is that it isn't purely used for its destructive power, it is a symbol. A symbol of anti-state sentiment used by mainly Agoreas and political dissidents from other GOIs, and nothing gets that message acros clearer than having a preference of using the ANARKM-12 associated with Agorean revolutionaries over the corporate associated Kalthoff Rifles. The ANARKM-12 is effective in close quarters combat due to its high damage per shot and powerful recoil. A well-placed shot can quickly neutralize an opponent. Its 7.62mm ammo deals a lot of damage, which is great for enemies up-close. However, the recoil can make it harder to control during rapid fire, especially in tight spaces. If that happens, it naturally is fitted with a bayonet to fight comfortably without ammunition. Overall, the ANARKM-12 excels in indoor levels and tight spaces which categorizes most levels. The ANARKM-12 is scattered all around The Backrooms in large amounts and can be seen sold by unaffiliated wanderers or other affiliated organizations as scrap. Due to this, the rifle is easy to pick up. The rifle is very much soldier-proof due to its durability, requiring minimal maintenance and can endure rust, snow, mud, as well as temperature extremes from boiling to freezing. ==Design== The ANARKM-12 like its predecessor, is an automatic rifle chambered in a 7.62×39mm cartridge. It is a selective fire, gas operated with a rotating bolt firing in either semi-automatic or automatic. A feature straying from the standard AKM is the safety lever being able to rotate 360 degrees which makes the weapon permanently locked in automatic firing mode and prevents it from turning back to its previous positions i.e safe, semi-automatic, and the ordinary automatic mode the rifle was originally on, for convenience this configuration will be referred to as "self-destruct" Upon rotating the safety lever 360 degrees from its automatic setting, a small spring-loaded pin which is integrated into the safety lever drops down into a slot within the lever that prevents any further movement of the safety lever. The 360 degree rotation triggers another set of contraptions of the chamber, by physically holding the gas piston in place by a detent mechanism, this locks the bolt carrier in place rendering it unable to eject dust covers. This doesn't completely disable the functionality of the ANARKM-12 as it's still able to fire around 2-3 more shots. After 3 shots with on self-destruct, the dust covers become dislodged within the chamber, causing the remaining bullets to not fire and being stuck in the chamber, leading to a large build up of pressure, gasses become trapped with nowhere to go, ultimately leading to an explosion where the wooden and steel components become shrapnel, heavily injuring the wielder and surrounding individuals. The rationale for the permanent locking mechanism is to give even severely weared down and rusted ANARKM-12's offensive capability while completely malfunctional. self-destruct often worked well as the cost of repairing an ANARKM-12 outweighed the cost of replacing it with a new one, and self-destruct prevents an opposing army from gaining a powerful weapon while dealing serious damage to a small army detachment in the process. self-destruct is the only major modification the ANARKM-12 has from a standard AKM. Besides that, design-wise, the ANARKM-12 is fully manufactured out of wood and steel due to those two materials being endemic on [[Level 92]], replacing many parts that would've been made out of plastic. Those parts are as follows: Magazines are made out of steel, the pistol grip is made of wood, and the handguard, made of wood features a vertical foregrip below it so the operator has better control over it meant to improve the rough wooden handguard it otherwise would have; Many minor external features are replaced with hollowed wood meant to reduce the firearm's weight as much as possible, but is still slightly heavier than an AKM, weighing in at 4 kg (8.8 lbs). The ANARKM-12 naturally comes supplied with accessory kits that contain a M1959 6H4 type bayonet with steel magazines. The bayonet is fitted with a polymer grip and scabbard to provide insulation from the metal blade when fixed; The rifle is readily able to fix its bayonet quickly by inserting the knife below the muzzle, aiming to give it edge in close quarters that the [[Object 29|Kalthoff Rifle]] lacks. ==Etymology== The term "ANARKM" is a portmanteau of "Anarchism" and "Avtomat Kalashnikova", the original namesake of the AK47. The "-12" at the very end of the name is short for 2012, the year of its manufacturing. Vernacularly it's called the ANAR-12 or just ANAR for conciseness and simplicity. ==Users== *The ANARKM-12 is mainly used by unaffiliated bands of wanderers who have attained the rifle via unregulated distribution systems via the [[Emporium of Agoreas]]. *[[File:The Auto Nexus Flag.png|25px]] Auto Nexus: Used by Auto Nexus' national security forces and is popular among the respected military culture *[[File:Narchism_real.png|25px]] Atrego: Used by whatever bandits who steal from supply depots. Atrego bandits are often seen using the rifle due to its built-in self destruct function as a substitute for booby trapped [[Object 29|Kalthoff Rifles]] *[[File:Toxari Logo.png|25px]] Toxari: Used by holy rebels due to accessibility *[[File:Republic of Aurielle New.png|25px]] Aurielle: Commonly used by Auries in their opposing forces (OPFOR) training *[[File:Ruphis.png|25px]] Ruphis Proletarium: Stolen by the tyrannical Proletarium and used against the original proletarian handlers. The Proletarium trades the rifle with Auto-Nexus *[[File:Anti-EntityAgencyLogo.png|25px]] Anti-Entity Group: Used to feed the organization's high demand for firearms in numerous entity cleansing operations ---- {{Collapse|num=1|initial='''+ Open Author Information +'''|final='''- Close Author Information -'''|body=Written by [[User:Elas5041|Sultan]] Inspired by [[User:Dulling|Dulling's]] [[Object 29|Kalthoff Rifle]] and [[C24N Seborna]]}} [[Category:Objects]] [[Category:Manmade Objects]]
